channel.title: The Resonant Builders
channel.description: A weekly essay series — and companion audio — exploring the Observer Resonance movement. Each essay asks whether Hilbert Space vectors can replace attention capture as the architecture of human communication. Hosted by J. Paul Duplantis, founder of i-DIG.io and author of the forthcoming manifesto We The Resonant Builders.
channel.itunes:author: J. Paul Duplantis
channel.itunes:subtitle: Building toward observer resonance — one signal at a time.
channel.copyright: © 2026 J. Paul Duplantis. All rights reserved.

item.title: The Geometry of Stories and Discovery — Audio Narration by Eleven Labs
item.description:
iDIG Movies is a film discovery experience built on the idea that the right film finds you — not through what's popular or trending, but through what resonates with who you are and how you're feeling right now.
Audio narration produced with Eleven Labs.
Read the full essay, preview the live demo, and join the conversation at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-geometry-of-stories-and-discovery
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: iDIG Movies is a film discovery experience built on the idea that the right film finds you — not through what's popular or trending, but through what resonates with who you are and how you're feeling right now.

item.title: The Geometry of Stories and Discovery — AI Discussion by Notebook LM
item.description:
A Notebook LM discussion of the essay "The Geometry of Stories and Discovery" — two voices exploring the ideas, implications, and questions the essay raises: resonance-driven film discovery, Hilbert space vectors, thematic trails, observer agency, Story Pathways, and the community protocol behind iDIG Movies.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-geometry-of-stories-and-discovery
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: A Notebook LM discussion of The Geometry of Stories and Discovery — resonance-driven film discovery, Hilbert space vectors, thematic trails, observer agency, and the community protocol behind iDIG Movies.

item.title: The Geometry of Stories and Discovery — Preview Live Demo
item.description:
A video walkthrough of the live iDIG Movies demo — exploring the discovery space, thematic trails, resonance scoring, and Story Pathways described in the essay "The Geometry of Stories and Discovery."
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-geometry-of-stories-and-discovery
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: A video walkthrough of the live iDIG Movies demo — thematic trails, resonance scoring, and Story Pathways in action.

item.title: The Geometry of Intent: Why Builders Should Design for Meaning, Not Keywords — Audio Narration by Eleven Labs
item.description:
Search tools treat human queries like compliance checks — match the exact keyword or the gate slams shut. Vector embeddings and the geometry of Hilbert space offer builders a different foundation: one where context outweighs keywords, and discovery becomes a matter of genuine proximity between meaning and intent.
Audio narration produced with Eleven Labs.
Read the full essay, watch the cinematic overview, and join the conversation at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-geometry-of-intent
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: Search tools treat human queries like compliance checks — match the exact keyword or the gate slams shut. Vector embeddings and the geometry of Hilbert space offer builders a different foundation where context outweighs keywords.

item.title: The Geometry of Intent: Why Builders Should Design for Meaning, Not Keywords — Podcasters Breakdown by Notebook LM
item.description:
A Notebook LM podcasters breakdown of the essay "The Geometry of Intent: Why Builders Should Design for Meaning, Not Keywords" — two voices exploring the ideas, implications, and questions the essay raises: vector embeddings, Hilbert space, and what it means to design discovery tools around the geometry of meaning instead of keyword matching.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-geometry-of-intent
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: A Notebook LM podcasters breakdown of The Geometry of Intent — vector embeddings, Hilbert space, and designing discovery tools around meaning instead of keywords.

item.title: The Geometry of Intent: Why Builders Should Design for Meaning, Not Keywords — Cinematic Overview by Notebook LM
item.description:
A Notebook LM cinematic overview for the essay "The Geometry of Intent: Why Builders Should Design for Meaning, Not Keywords" — a visual walkthrough of vector embeddings, Hilbert space, and the geometry of intent across professional, systemic, emotional, and societal examples.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-geometry-of-intent
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: A Notebook LM cinematic overview of The Geometry of Intent — vector embeddings, Hilbert space, and the geometry of intent across professional, systemic, emotional, and societal examples.

item.title: McLuhan, AI, and the Architecture of Agency — Audio Narration by Eleven Labs
item.description:
McLuhan predicted that the computer would extend our central nervous system in a global embrace. Today's AI fulfills that prophecy — but his framework is less a warning about the rise of the machine and more a diagnostic map for builders who want to preserve human agency in an ambient AI landscape.
Audio narration produced with Eleven Labs.
Read the full essay, watch the cinematic overview, and join the conversation at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/mcluhan-ai-agency
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: McLuhan predicted that the computer would extend our central nervous system in a global embrace. Today's AI fulfills that prophecy — and his framework is a diagnostic map for builders who want to preserve human agency.

item.title: McLuhan, AI, and the Architecture of Agency — Podcasters Breakdown by Notebook LM
item.description:
A Notebook LM podcasters breakdown of the essay "McLuhan, AI, and the Architecture of Agency" — two voices exploring the ideas, implications, and questions the essay raises: McLuhan's auto-amputation theory, the narcosis of AI automation, counter-environments, and the mandate for resonant builders.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/mcluhan-ai-agency
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: A Notebook LM podcasters breakdown of McLuhan, AI, and the Architecture of Agency — auto-amputation, the narcosis of automation, counter-environments, and the mandate for resonant builders.

item.description:
A Notebook LM cinematic overview for the essay "McLuhan, AI, and the Architecture of Agency" — a visual walkthrough of McLuhan's nervous system metaphor, the auto-amputation effect, counter-environments, and the invitation to resonant builders.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/mcluhan-ai-agency
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: A Notebook LM cinematic overview of McLuhan, AI, and the Architecture of Agency — the nervous system metaphor, auto-amputation, counter-environments, and the invitation to resonant builders.

item.title: The Fractal Escape: From Doom Scrolling to Zoom Scrolling — Listen to Essay
item.description:
Doom scrolling hijacks the primordial brain with a relentless stream of micro-shocks. Zoom scrolling offers a way out — navigating information as a fractal geometry of resonance rather than a flat feed of noise.
J. Paul Duplantis reads the second essay of the We The Resonant Builders series — exploring Hilbert Space vectors, iDIG Movies, Social Worker Alignment, and a Trust Protocol designed to keep the geometry sovereign.
Read the full essay, watch the AI explainer video, and join the conversation at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-fractal-escape
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: Doom scrolling hijacks the primordial brain with micro-shocks. Zoom scrolling offers a way out — navigating information as a fractal geometry of resonance rather than a flat feed of noise.

item.title: The Fractal Escape: From Doom Scrolling to Zoom Scrolling — AI Discussion
item.description:
An AI-generated discussion of the essay "The Fractal Escape: From Doom Scrolling to Zoom Scrolling" — two voices exploring the ideas, implications, and questions the essay raises: the hijacked primordial brain, Hilbert Space navigation, iDIG Movies, Social Worker Alignment, Zoom scrolling for the public square, and the Trust Protocol.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-fractal-escape

item.title: The Awakening: Tuning into the Signal of Human Potential — Listen to Essay
item.description:
We are living through the slow decay of digital platforms — but something is stirring. A 20-year journey into observer resonance, Hilbert Space vectors, and the iDIG protocol.
J. Paul Duplantis reads the opening essay of the We The Resonant Builders series — a manifesto for a movement that believes the next architecture of human communication must be built on resonance, not capture.
Read the full essay, watch the AI explainer video, and join the conversation at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-awakening
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
item.itunes:summary: We are living through the slow decay of digital platforms — but something is stirring. A 20-year journey into observer resonance, Hilbert Space vectors, and the iDIG protocol.

item.description:
An AI-generated discussion of the essay "The Awakening: Tuning into the Signal of Human Potential" — two voices exploring the ideas, implications, and questions the essay raises: enshittification, Quantum Social Science, Hilbert Space vectors, and what it means to build for observer resonance.
Read the full essay at: https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders/the-awakening
Subscribe to The Resonant Builders at https://i-dig.io/theresonantbuilders
